stemHtml: When taking-off after a widebody aircraft which has just landed, you should take-off…

options.a: in front of the point where the aircraft`s wheels have touched down.
options.b: at the point where the aircraft`s wheels have touched the ground and on the down wind side of the runway.
options.c: at the point where the aircraft`s wheels have touched down and on the wind side of the runway.
options.d: beyond the point where the aircraft`s wheels have touched down.
